entries.prompt: Korean Kmong commercial gig thumbnail, square 1:1 aspect ratio, 1024x1024. Background: magenta #DB2777 to indigo #4338CA gradient background, cyan #22D3EE glow accent. Mood: futuristic AI, soft glow, intelligent automation. BIG bold Korean headline text TOP-CENTER: "AI 활용 이력서/자소서 첨삭 서비스" — high contrast white with yellow #FBBF24 highlight stroke, sans-serif Noto Sans KR bold, very readable on mobile. Subtitle in smaller Korean below headline: "AI 분석" — clean white. Central visual: glowing AI brain or neural network node, chatbot bubble, sparkle stars, prompt input box mockup. Modern flat illustration with 3D depth and soft glow effects. Small Korean target badge top-right: "취준생". Korean price badge bottom-right: "3만원부터" — yellow #FBBF24 rounded badge with shadow, very prominent. Trust icons bottom-left: shield/checkmark/lock icon trio. Generous margins for mobile legibility. Professional commercial ecommerce thumbnail style. STRICTLY NO watermarks, NO human faces, NO company logos, NO competitor brand marks, NO English paragraphs (numbers and short ASCII OK), NO lorem ipsum.
